specific_mechanism: Talmudic dialectic interprets law through opposing schools' arguments preserved verbatim; final ruling emerges from sustained dialectic, not single-authority decree
llm_application: LLM constitutional-AI training via preserved dissent: train on adversarial pairs of opposing principles, both retained in the model; final answer emerges from latent dialectic.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes jurisprudence-specific adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
